§6Uranium-235§f

§aThe fissile uranium isotope — essential for nuclear fuel and weapons!§f

§bUranium-235§f is the rare, fissile isotope of uranium, making up only a small fraction of natural uranium. It's infamous for its use in nuclear fission weapons (Little Boy) and as a key component in reactor fuel.

§6Production§f:
§b• Gas Centrifuge Cascade§f: §e4§f centrifuges processing UF6 → §e1§f U-235 nugget + §e11§f U-238 + §e4§f fluorite per §e10§f operations (last centrifuge needs Overclocking upgrade)
§b• SILEX§f: processes uranium powder, UF6, or depleted uranium fuel
§b• Loot§f: Desert Atoms contain U-235

§6Uses§f:
§b• Uranium Reactor Fuel§f
§b• Nuclear Warheads§f: "gun" type bombs
§b• Breeding§f: U-235 → Np-237 → Pu-238 (radioisotope cell for infinite power)
§b• Custom Nuke§f: contributes §e15§f to nuclear stage

§eTip§f: U-235 is the gatekeeper for nuclear power. Set up a Gas Centrifuge cascade early for a steady supply. Later, switch to SILEX for faster enrichment!
